열왕기상 12:1.content: Rehoboam went to Shechem, for all Israel had come to Shechem to make him king.

열왕기상 12:2.content: When Jeroboam the son of Nebat heard of it (for he was yet in Egypt, where he had fled from the presence of king Solomon, and Jeroboam lived in Egypt,

열왕기상 12:3.content: and they sent and called him), Jeroboam and all the assembly of Israel came, and spoke to Rehoboam, saying,

열왕기상 12:4.content: “Your father made our yoke difficult. Now therefore make the hard service of your father, and his heavy yoke which he put on us, lighter, and we will serve you.”

열왕기상 12:5.content: He said to them, “Depart for three days, then come back to me.” So the people departed.

열왕기상 12:6.content: King Rehoboam took counsel with the old men, who had stood before Solomon his father while he yet lived, saying, “What counsel do you give me to answer these people?”

열왕기상 12:7.content: They replied, “If you will be a servant to this people today, and will serve them, and answer them with good words, then they will be your servants forever.”

열왕기상 12:8.content: But he abandoned the counsel of the old men which they had given him, and took counsel with the young men who had grown up with him, who stood before him.

열왕기상 12:9.content: He said to them, “What counsel do you give, that we may answer these people, who have spoken to me, saying, ‘Make the yoke that your father put on us lighter?’ ”

열왕기상 12:10.content: The young men who had grown up with him said to him, “Tell these people who spoke to you, saying, ‘Your father made our yoke heavy, but make it lighter to us;’ tell them, ‘My little finger is thicker than my father’s waist.

열왕기상 12:11.content: Now my father burdened you with a heavy yoke, but I will add to your yoke. My father chastised you with whips, but I will chastise you with scorpions.’ ”

열왕기상 12:12.content: So Jeroboam and all the people came to Rehoboam the third day, as the king asked, saying, “Come to me again the third day.”

열왕기상 12:13.content: The king answered the people roughly, and abandoned the counsel of the old men which they had given him,

열왕기상 12:14.content: and spoke to them according to the counsel of the young men, saying, “My father made your yoke heavy, but I will add to your yoke. My father chastised you with whips, but I will chastise you with scorpions.”

열왕기상 12:15.content: So the king didn’t listen to the people; for it was a thing brought about from Yahweh, that he might establish his word, which Yahweh spoke by Ahijah the Shilonite to Jeroboam the son of Nebat.

열왕기상 12:16.content: When all Israel saw that the king didn’t listen to them, the people answered the king, saying, “What portion have we in David? We don’t have an inheritance in the son of Jesse. To your tents, Israel! Now see to your own house, David.” So Israel departed to their tents.

열왕기상 12:17.content: But as for the children of Israel who lived in the cities of Judah, Rehoboam reigned over them.

열왕기상 12:18.content: Then king Rehoboam sent Adoram, who was over the men subject to forced labor; and all Israel stoned him to death with stones. King Rehoboam hurried to get himself up to his chariot, to flee to Jerusalem.

열왕기상 12:19.content: So Israel rebelled against David’s house to this day.

열왕기상 12:20.content: When all Israel heard that Jeroboam had returned, they sent and called him to the congregation, and made him king over all Israel. There was no one who followed David’s house, except for the tribe of Judah only.

열왕기상 12:21.content: When Rehoboam had come to Jerusalem, he assembled all the house of Judah and the tribe of Benjamin, a hundred and eighty thousand chosen men, who were warriors, to fight against the house of Israel, to bring the kingdom again to Rehoboam the son of Solomon.

열왕기상 12:22.content: But the word of God came to Shemaiah the man of God, saying,

열왕기상 12:23.content: “Speak to Rehoboam the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and to all the house of Judah and Benjamin, and to the rest of the people, saying,

열왕기상 12:24.content: ‘Yahweh says, “You shall not go up or fight against your brothers, the children of Israel. Everyone return to his house; for this thing is from me.” ’ ” So they listened to Yahweh’s word, and returned and went their way, according to Yahweh’s word.

열왕기상 12:25.content: Then Jeroboam built Shechem in the hill country of Ephraim, and lived in it; and he went out from there, and built Penuel.

열왕기상 12:26.content: Jeroboam said in his heart, “Now the kingdom will return to David’s house.

열왕기상 12:27.content: If this people goes up to offer sacrifices in Yahweh’s house at Jerusalem, then the heart of this people will turn again to their lord, even to Rehoboam king of Judah; and they will kill me, and return to Rehoboam king of Judah.”

열왕기상 12:28.content: So the king took counsel, and made two calves of gold; and he said to them, “It is too much for you to go up to Jerusalem. Look and behold your gods, Israel, which brought you up out of the land of Egypt!”

열왕기상 12:29.content: He set the one in Bethel, and the other he put in Dan.

열왕기상 12:30.content: This thing became a sin; for the people went even as far as Dan to worship before the one there.

열왕기상 12:31.content: He made houses of high places, and made priests from among all the people, who were not of the sons of Levi.

열왕기상 12:32.content: Jeroboam ordained a feast in the eighth month, on the fifteenth day of the month, like the feast that is in Judah, and he went up to the altar. He did so in Bethel, sacrificing to the calves that he had made, and he placed in Bethel the priests of the high places that he had made.

열왕기상 12:33.content: He went up to the altar which he had made in Bethel on the fifteenth day in the eighth month, even in the month which he had devised of his own heart; and he ordained a feast for the children of Israel, and went up to the altar, to burn incense.
